title: juncus uncialis
intro: Juncus uncialis, also known as the alpine rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, and has been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, Juncus uncialis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves to aid in wound healing and skin regeneration.
